title: Maximum Length of Pair Chain
description: Cho pairs [a,b] với a<b. Chuỗi pair chain nếu b_prev < a_next. Tìm độ dài chain dài nhất.
approach: Sort theo end b; greedy chọn nếu a>prev_end.
memoryTip: Pair chain — sort by end, greedy extend chain.

solutions.c: int findLongestChain(int** pairs,int n,int* cs){ int cmp(const void*a,const void*b){return ((int**)a)[0][1]-((int**)b)[0][1];} qsort(pairs,n,sizeof(int*),cmp); int end=-1000000000,ans=0,i; for(i=0;i<n;i++) if(pairs[i][0]>end){ans++;end=pairs[i][1];} return ans; }

analysis.correctness: Greedy by end time — classic interval scheduling.
pitfalls: Use b not a for end
